manualWorkflow: Read every email manually, prioritize by gut feel, write replies from scratch
aiWorkflow: AI summarizes and ranks urgency, flags high-impact emails, drafts replies for review

manualWorkflow: Write every customer reply from scratch, manually track issue types
aiWorkflow: AI drafts responses for review, clusters complaints by type, suggests root cause fixes
businessValue: Faster support, consistent tone, better CSAT

manualWorkflow: Export data from Shopify, build spreadsheet, manually analyze trends
aiWorkflow: AI creates daily summary with insights, highlights winners and underperformers
businessValue: Clearer insights, no manual spreadsheet work

manualWorkflow: Update spreadsheet model manually, guess reorder timing
aiWorkflow: AI explains demand risks, connects inventory to sales velocity and lead times

manualWorkflow: Check each SKU manually, compare to rough mental estimate
aiWorkflow: AI flags reorder points, calculates days of stock remaining, suggests purchase orders

manualWorkflow: Compare campaigns manually, update budget spreadsheet by hand
aiWorkflow: AI recommends budget shifts, identifies ROAS winners, flags underperformers

manualWorkflow: Manual note-taking during meetings, write up action items afterward
aiWorkflow: AI creates structured summary, action items with owners, decisions list, and follow-up email
businessValue: Better execution, nothing falls through the cracks

manualWorkflow: Review P&L manually, calculate margins by hand, look for anomalies
aiWorkflow: AI flags warning signs, explains tradeoffs, connects financial data to operating decisions
businessValue: Better cash control, faster financial decisions
